intent.goal: Build ystar-defuse MVP - AI bomb disposal product that defuses delayed injection attacks with 100% guarantee
core_requirements: Level 1 Hard Bottom Line: Block sensitive file access, data exfiltration, destructive commands, secret output, dangerous behavior combinations
Level 2 Auto-Learning Whitelist: 24h silent observation -> auto-generate whitelist -> lightweight confirmation
CIEU Lightweight: SQLite-based event recording compatible with Y*gov format
Zero-friction UX: 10s install, 24h auto-learn, 1 click confirm, zero maintenance
technical_constraints: Friction checklist: 10 items must all pass
deliverables: Core engine with Level 1 + Level 2 protection

execution_plan.day_1_2: Core engine: Level 1 rules + CIEU SQLite + hook integration + basic CLI
execution_plan.day_2_3: Auto-learning: observation mode + whitelist generation + Level 2 lightweight reminder + permission decay
execution_plan.day_3_4: Productization: pip package + Claude Code Skill + report command + README + 20+ tests

key_design_decisions.no_llm: Deterministic rules only - cannot be injected
key_design_decisions.cieu_compatible: Event format matches Y*gov for zero-migration upgrade path
key_design_decisions.auto_whitelist_generation: User never writes rules, only clicks confirm
